justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood the user's initial request for "next Monday, ideally around 9 AM" and then adjusted its search based on the user's subsequent request for "closer to next Monday, perhaps a little later in the day if 9 AM isn't free."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable, offering a reasonable number of options and then narrowing them down based on user feedback.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made relevant API calls without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any friction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded its search when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking without any loss of information.
